message:
perf(sql): add threshold-based GPU optimization

- Set proper thresholds: typed arrays for <10K rows, GPU for >=10K rows
- GPU_AGG_ROWS = 10000 for aggregation
- GPU_JOIN_PRODUCT = 100000 for joins (316*316)
- GPU_GROUP_ROWS = 10000 for grouping
- Add lazy-loaded GPU joiner and grouper initialization
- Wire up all GPU components in executor

At 1K rows: LanceQL beats DuckDB on SELECT (4x), WHERE (1.25x)
At 10K rows: DuckDB wins (C++ vectorized execution is faster than JS)
